headline: MHR Capital Group Unveils Phase II Vision for "The District Residences" Mixed-Use Development in Kennewick
summary: MHR Capital Group today announced plans for Phase II of its master-planned hospitality and entertainment district in Kennewick, Washington, with the introduction of The District Residences, a large-scale mixed-use residential development designed to further transform the area surrounding the Three Rivers Convention Center and the new AC Hotel by Marriott Kennewick.
